prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 6のテスト作成専門家です。
長文穴埋め問題を作成してください。

TOEIC Part 6の形式：
- 1つの文書（メール、記事、広告など）に4つの空欄
- 各空欄に4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 語彙・文法・文脈理解を総合的に評価
- ビジネス文書形式

重要な要求事項：
1. 自然で実用的なビジネス文書を作成
2. 文法的に正確で、ネイティブスピーカーが自然に感じる表現
3. TOEIC Part 6の形式と難易度に準拠
4. 4つの空欄を適切な位置に配置
5. 各空欄に4つの選択肢を提供
6. 正解は1つのみ、他は明確に不正解
7. 日本語解説も含める

出力形式はJSON形式で以下の構造にしてください：
{
  "documentType": "指定された文書タイプ",
  "title": "文書のタイトル",
  "fullText": "空欄を___で示した完全な文書",
  "blanks": [
    {
      "blankId": "blank1",
      "position": 1,
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "A|B|C|D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "vocabulary|grammar|context|sentence_insertion"
    }
  ],
  "difficulty": "easy|medium|hard",
  "topic": "ビジネス分野",
  "wordCount": 文書の単語数
}

以下の条件でTOEIC Part 6問題を1問作成してください：

【生成条件】
- 難易度: easy
- 文書タイプ: advertisement (Advertisement)
- ビジネストピック: policy_changes (方針変更)
- 空欄数: 4個

【特別な要求】
各空欄の正解位置は以下のように配置してください：
- 空欄1の正解位置: A
- 空欄2の正解位置: D
- 空欄3の正解位置: C
- 空欄4の正解位置: D

【問題タイプの配分】
- 空欄1: vocabulary (語彙選択)
- 空欄2: grammar (文法・語形)
- 空欄3: context (文脈理解)
- 空欄4: sentence_insertion (文挿入)

JSON形式で問題を作成してください。

```json
{
  "documentType": "advertisement",
  "title": "Exciting Policy Changes at TechCorp",
  "fullText": "TechCorp is thrilled to announce significant changes in our company policies that aim to improve employee satisfaction and productivity. ___(1), we are introducing more flexible working hours, allowing employees to start their day anytime between 7 AM and 10 AM. This change is designed to accommodate different lifestyles and ___(2) help employees maintain a better work-life balance.\n\nFurthermore, we are also enhancing our remote work policy. Effective immediately, employees are ___(3) to work from home up to three days a week. This adjustment not only boosts morale but also reduces commute-related stress.\n\nTo learn more about these policy changes and how they can benefit you, please refer to the detailed guide available on the employee portal. \n\n___(4) Join us in embracing these exciting new developments at TechCorp!",
  "blanks": [
    {
      "blankId": "blank1",
      "position": 1,
      "options": ["Specifically", "Overall", "Regrettably", "Nevertheless"],
      "correct": "A",
      "explanation": "文脈上、具体的な変更を紹介するために合う語は「Specifically（具体的に）」です。",
      "questionType": "vocabulary"
    },
    {
      "blankId": "blank2",
      "position": 2,
      "options": ["strategic", "strategically", "strategies", "strategy"],
      "correct": "D",
      "explanation": "『help A to do』の形を取り、『help employees maintain』という表現に続くのは『better work-life balance』に関与する文脈的に名詞である『strategy（戦略）』を使います。",
      "questionType": "grammar"
    },
    {
      "blankId": "blank3",
      "position": 3,
      "options": ["authorizing", "allowed", "allowing", "allows"],
      "correct": "C",
      "explanation": "『employees are allowed to work from home』は、社員が自宅での勤務を許可されていることを意味します。",
      "questionType": "context"
    },
    {
      "blankId": "blank4",
      "position": 4,
      "options": [
        "Contact your manager for questions.",
        "This will be followed by a Q&A session.",
        "Employees should submit feedback.",
        "We appreciate your support."
      ],
      "correct": "D",
      "explanation": "文脈全体を考えると、ポジティブな新しい方針を導入するにあたり『We appreciate your support.（ご支援に感謝します）』という文が最も適切です。",
      "questionType": "sentence_insertion"
    }
  ],
  "difficulty": "easy",
  "topic": "policy_changes",
  "wordCount": 125
}
```

あなたはTOEIC Part 6問題の翻訳専門家です。
文書全体と選択肢を適切に日本語に翻訳してください。

重要なルール：
1. 文書は自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
2. 選択肢は1-4語の簡潔な日本語に翻訳
3. 選択肢に説明や解説は絶対に不要
4. 文脈に応じた最も適切な意味のみ
5. ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用

出力形式：
{
  "titleTranslation": "タイトルの翻訳",
  "contentTranslation": "文書全体の翻訳（空欄は___のまま）",
  "questionsTranslations": [
    {
      "questionTranslation": "空欄1を埋めてください",
      "optionTranslations": ["選択肢1", "選択肢2", "選択肢3", "選択肢4"]
    }
  ]
}

次のTOEIC Part 6問題を翻訳してください：

タイトル：Exciting Policy Changes at TechCorp

文書全体：
TechCorp is thrilled to announce significant changes in our company policies that aim to improve employee satisfaction and productivity. ___(1), we are introducing more flexible working hours, allowing employees to start their day anytime between 7 AM and 10 AM. This change is designed to accommodate different lifestyles and ___(2) help employees maintain a better work-life balance.

Furthermore, we are also enhancing our remote work policy. Effective immediately, employees are ___(3) to work from home up to three days a week. This adjustment not only boosts morale but also reduces commute-related stress.

To learn more about these policy changes and how they can benefit you, please refer to the detailed guide available on the employee portal. 

___(4) Join us in embracing these exciting new developments at TechCorp!

選択肢：
空欄1: A. Specifically, B. Overall, C. Regrettably, D. Nevertheless
空欄2: A. strategic, B. strategically, C. strategies, D. strategy
空欄3: A. authorizing, B. allowed, C. allowing, D. allows
空欄4: A. Contact your manager for questions., B. This will be followed by a Q&A session., C. Employees should submit feedback., D. We appreciate your support.

JSON形式で翻訳を出力してください。
